title: Dreams
album: Everybody Else Is Doing It, So Why Can't We?
why_this_song: Dreams by The Cranberries (1992) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 3 times; first heard in: "In every possible way"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's never quite as it seems"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's never quite as it seems"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "It's never quite as it seems"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I want more, impossible to ignore"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "possible" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "possible" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "never" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "never" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, my life is changing everyday
The person falling here is me

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Dreams", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Dreams", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Dreams" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Dreams" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Dreams" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Dreams", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
